title: digera muricata subsp. muricata
intro: Digera muricata subsp. muricata, also known as the 'Land Caltrop', is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Digera muricata subsp. muricata include its ability to act as an anti-diabetic, anti-bacterial, and anti-fungal agent, which can help in managing various health conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
